title: Synthetic Hyperelastic data for DDI
author: Leygue, Adrien
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Synthetic data used in the case study (section
of: Marie Dalémat, Michel Coret, Adrien Leygue, Erwan Verron. Robustness of the Data-Driven Identification algorithm with incomplete input data.

⟨hal-03028848v3⟩ The data in XDMF + hdf5 format comprises: 1-the 2D computational mesh with triangular linear elements, 2-the nodal Forces for all loading steps (nodal quantity), 3-the displacement for all loading steps (nodal quantity), 4- Cauchy stress fields for all loading steps (cell quantity).
